description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house with a long, narrow footprint and a gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are divided into two main sections: the lower portion is clad in greenish brickwork, while the upper section is finished in a light beige or gray render. The front facade features a central entry door accessed by a small set of steps, flanked by symmetrically placed windows, and a large double garage door on one side. The roof includes a visible chimney pipe and a gutter system running along the eaves. Windows are rectangular and evenly spaced, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban or rural residential architecture.
description: A single-story rectangular house with a gable roof, brick and rendered walls, central entry steps, and a double garage door. The design is simple, with symmetrical windows and a reddish-brown tiled roof.
description_view_0: End view showing the gable roof, two small windows, and the layered wall materials.
description_view_1: Side view with the main entry door, symmetrical windows, and steps leading to the entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite end view with the gable roof, no visible windows, and clear wall layering.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the main entry, symmetrical windows, and a large double garage door.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a single door, small set of steps, and no porch or overhang; simple and functional.
